title: Fortis Escorts Faridabad launches dedicated robotic surgery institute
summary: Fortis Escorts Hospital, Faridabad has launched the Fortis Institute of Robotic Surgery, a dedicated centre that brings together robotic-assisted surgical services across multiple specialties under a single programme. The institute […]
thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.
contentHtml:
New centre brings together robotic surgery services across multiple specialties under a single programme

Fortis Escorts Hospital, Faridabad has launched the Fortis Institute of Robotic Surgery, a dedicated centre that brings together robotic-assisted surgical services across multiple specialties under a single programme.

The institute integrates robotic surgical systems, dedicated operating facilities, and multidisciplinary clinical teams to support minimally invasive procedures. It will offer robotic-assisted surgeries in specialties including oncology, general and gastrointestinal surgery, urology, orthopaedics, cardiothoracic and vascular surgery (CTVS), ENT, and gynaecology. The programme is supported by imaging, diagnostic, and peri-operative care services.

In addition to clinical services, it is intended to support surgical training, skill development, and the adoption of emerging surgical technologies. The initiative is part of the hospital’s broader focus on expanding robotic-assisted surgical capabilities.

Speaking at the launch, Dr Abhishek Sharma, Facility Director, Fortis Escorts Hospital, Faridabad, said, “The Fortis Institute of Robotic Surgery is one of its kind Integrated Programme in Faridabad, and its purpose goes beyond delivering clinical excellence. It is designed to be a catalyst, a place where the next generation of surgical technologies are adopted, refined, and innovated upon. Patient outcomes remain our foremost priority, and we are committed to being an agile, multidisciplinary partner in care delivery across specialties.”
